/usr/bin/ar qc libmantle_renderer.a CMakeFiles/mantle_renderer.dir/core/engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mantle_renderer.dir/runtime/runtime.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mantle_renderer.dir/modules/input/input_system.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mantle_renderer.dir/modules/sound/sound_system.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mantle_renderer.dir/modules/physics/physics_world.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mantle_renderer.dir/vulkan_renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mantle_renderer.dir/opengl/opengl_renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mantle_renderer.dir/renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mantle_renderer.dir/vulkan/vulkan_stub.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libmantle_renderer.a
